calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff?S Reqeust For A Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Robert S. Fletcher, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Viewnine Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Kevin Scott Olson, Jr.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Alex Reyes sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $55,600.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $625.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $56,225.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Continued To Apr-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
